# rustlab — AI reference

The full scripting reference lives in the docs directory:

  docs/functions.md   — all built-in functions, constants, and toolboxes
  docs/examples.md    — annotated example walkthroughs
  README.md           — quickstart and CLI usage

Read those files for up-to-date function signatures, types, and examples.
Script extension: .r   Run: rustlab run script.r   REPL: rustlab
